systemStatus.headline: Sat May 23 4 AM run - all sources read OK. Toast caught up: Thu May 21 DPS now IN (was 2 days behind). Sling latest = Fri May 22 (Sat 5/23 not emailed yet). New Google 5-star from Scott A. No actionable Yelp/TripAdvisor. GitHub PAT 200 OK.
systemStatus.detail: (1) Toast: Thu May 21 DPS in (arrived Fri 5/22 7:39 AM) - Net $4,853.40 / Gross $5,027.60, labor 14.4% $700.72, discounts $174.20, voids $102.50 (UP 122.8% vs SDLW $46), refunds $0; guests ~196 / orders ~118 DERIVED from avg-check division. Fri May 22 DPS not arrived at 4 AM (normal ~7:38 AM). (2) Sling: latest = Fri May 22 (10 emp, 51.16 hrs, 0 OT, 0 uncovered, 2 off). Sat May 23 report not emailed yet. Isael Salvador Narciso (Cook) still shows 4:57A-4:57A malformed/open shift - verify in Sling. (3) Google Ads: 2 report emails/24h, no disapprovals; campaign still 'Limited by budget'. Email-only run, daily metrics carried from May 22 scrape (May 21 data). (4) Yelp: 2 marketing emails only, nothing actionable. (5) TripAdvisor: no new ad-analytics email in 24h. (6) GitHub PAT: 200 OK.

toast.source: Toast 229 W Montecito DPS for Thu May 21 (arrived Fri May 22 7:39 AM PT). Fri May 22 DPS not yet delivered at Sat 4 AM run.
toast.note: Thu May 21 (latest Toast DPS, arrived Fri 5/22 7:39 AM): Net $4,853.40 / Gross $5,027.60, -8.5% net vs same day last week (Thu May 14 $5,301.55). Labor 14.4% ($700.72) - down from 17.1% SDLW, healthy. Discounts $174.20, voids $102.50 (UP 122.8% vs $46 SDLW - check). Refunds $0. Guests ~196 / orders ~118 ($24.76/guest, $41.13/check) DERIVED from avg-check division (DPS summary cards not text-extractable; cross-checks vs % deltas). Revenue split: Dining Room $3,258.60 (67%) / Bar $1,594.80 (33%). Category sales % and dayparts not extracted this run. Fri May 22 DPS not arrived at Sat 4 AM.

sling.note: Prior schedule (Thu May 21) carried forward. Freshest report is Fri May 22 in slingToday.

slingToday.note: Latest Sling report = Fri May 22 (7:00 AM PT). Sat May 23 report not yet emailed at 4 AM run, so today's (Sat) schedule is not yet available - showing freshest (Fri 5/22). NOTE: Isael Salvador Narciso (Cook) shows 4:57A-4:57A - malformed/open shift entry; verify in Sling.
